bait.description: A basic fishing consumable used with rod-based methods.
bait.acquisition: It is usually bought from the Fishing Supplier in Starter Town.
bait.uses: It is consumed by rod-based fishing methods and can be traded to the Fishing Supplier in Starter Town.

burnt_salmon.description: A burnt version of Raw Salmon created by a failed Cooking attempt.
burnt_salmon.acquisition: It is created when Raw Salmon burns during Cooking.
burnt_salmon.uses: It has no gameplay use beyond being traded to the Fishing Supplier in Starter Town.

burnt_shrimp.description: A burnt version of Raw Shrimp created by a failed Cooking attempt.
burnt_shrimp.acquisition: It is created when Raw Shrimp burns during Cooking.
burnt_shrimp.uses: It has no gameplay use beyond being traded to the Fishing Supplier in Starter Town.

burnt_swordfish.description: A burnt version of Raw Swordfish created by a failed Cooking attempt.
burnt_swordfish.acquisition: It is created when Raw Swordfish burns during Cooking.
burnt_swordfish.uses: It has no gameplay use beyond being traded to the Fishing Supplier in Starter Town.

burnt_trout.description: A burnt version of Raw Trout created by a failed Cooking attempt.
burnt_trout.acquisition: It is created when Raw Trout burns during Cooking.
burnt_trout.uses: It has no gameplay use beyond being traded to the Fishing Supplier in Starter Town.

burnt_tuna.description: A burnt version of Raw Tuna created by a failed Cooking attempt.
burnt_tuna.acquisition: It is created when Raw Tuna burns during Cooking.
burnt_tuna.uses: It has no gameplay use beyond being traded to the Fishing Supplier in Starter Town.

cooked_salmon.description: A cooked fish food item that restores 7 HP when eaten.
cooked_salmon.acquisition: It is usually made by Cooking Raw Salmon starting at level 20.
cooked_salmon.uses: It restores HP when eaten and can be traded to the Fishing Supplier in Starter Town.

cooked_shrimp.description: A cooked fish food item that restores 3 HP when eaten.
cooked_shrimp.acquisition: It is usually made by Cooking Raw Shrimp starting at level 1.
cooked_shrimp.uses: It restores HP when eaten and can be traded to the Fishing Supplier in Starter Town.

cooked_swordfish.description: A cooked fish food item that restores 12 HP when eaten.
cooked_swordfish.acquisition: It is usually made by Cooking Raw Swordfish starting at level 40.
cooked_swordfish.uses: It restores HP when eaten and can be traded to the Fishing Supplier in Starter Town.

cooked_trout.description: A cooked fish food item that restores 5 HP when eaten.
cooked_trout.acquisition: It is usually made by Cooking Raw Trout starting at level 10.
cooked_trout.uses: It restores HP when eaten and can be traded to the Fishing Supplier in Starter Town.

cooked_tuna.description: A cooked fish food item that restores 9 HP when eaten.
cooked_tuna.acquisition: It is usually made by Cooking Raw Tuna starting at level 30.
cooked_tuna.uses: It restores HP when eaten and can be traded to the Fishing Supplier in Starter Town.

fishing_rod.description: A fishing tool used for rod fishing methods.
fishing_rod.acquisition: It is usually bought from the Fishing Supplier in Starter Town.
fishing_rod.uses: It is used for rod fishing methods, usually with bait, and can be traded to the Fishing Supplier or Fishing Teacher in Starter Town.

harpoon.description: A fishing tool used for harpoon fishing methods.
harpoon.acquisition: This batch does not export a direct acquisition path for it, so the entry stays conservative.
harpoon.uses: It is used for harpoon fishing methods and can be equipped for combat.

raw_salmon.description: A raw fish resource gathered through Fishing and used in Cooking.
raw_salmon.acquisition: It is usually gathered at Shallow Water with a Fishing Rod starting at level 20.
raw_salmon.uses: It is a Cooking input for Cooked Salmon and can be traded to the Fishing Supplier in Starter Town.

raw_shrimp.description: A raw fish resource gathered through Fishing and used in Cooking.
raw_shrimp.acquisition: It is usually gathered at Shallow Water with a Small Net starting at level 1.
raw_shrimp.uses: It is a Cooking input for Cooked Shrimp and can be traded to the Fishing Supplier in Starter Town.

raw_swordfish.description: A raw fish resource gathered through Fishing and used in Cooking.
raw_swordfish.acquisition: It is usually gathered at Deep Water with a Harpoon-class tool starting at level 40.
raw_swordfish.uses: It is a Cooking input for Cooked Swordfish and can be traded to the Fishing Supplier in Starter Town.

raw_trout.description: A raw fish resource gathered through Fishing and used in Cooking.
raw_trout.acquisition: It is usually gathered at Shallow Water with a Fishing Rod starting at level 10.
raw_trout.uses: It is a Cooking input for Cooked Trout and can be traded to the Fishing Supplier in Starter Town.

raw_tuna.description: A raw fish resource gathered through Fishing and used in Cooking.
raw_tuna.acquisition: It is usually gathered at Deep Water or Shallow Water with a Harpoon-class tool starting at level 30.
raw_tuna.uses: It is a Cooking input for Cooked Tuna and can be traded to the Fishing Supplier in Starter Town.

rune_harpoon.description: A fishing tool used for harpoon fishing methods.
rune_harpoon.acquisition: This batch does not export a direct acquisition path for it, so the entry stays conservative.
rune_harpoon.uses: It is used for harpoon fishing methods and can be traded to the Fishing Teacher in Starter Town. It can also be equipped for combat.

small_net.description: A fishing tool used for small net fishing methods.
small_net.acquisition: It is usually bought from the Fishing Supplier in Starter Town.
small_net.uses: It is used for small net fishing methods and can be traded to the Fishing Supplier or Fishing Teacher in Starter Town.
